title: Canonical JSON formatting policy
summary: The json-formatting feature ships a canonical JSON formatting policy across all Round-02 R1 surfaces: repository .json artifacts, Markdown-embedded JSON, terminal/CLI output from pan, and agent-chat JSON sketches. A shared canonical formatter module (lib/internal/tools/canonical-json-format.mjs) provides…
planning_context: handoff.handoff_note: Feature index links delivery report, ship artifacts, and migration evidence. After human accepts this index artifact, run pan close-artifacts for archival closure per complete-stage prompt.

intake.scope_correction_note: Operator scope correction on 2026-05-23 re-ratified spec to cover all R1 JSON surfaces (repository .json, Markdown-embedded JSON, terminal/CLI JSON, agent-chat JSON), not repository .json only.
archival_policy: Durable feature memory stores the compact index and machine-checkable contracts only. Full specs, plans, delivery reports, generated evidence, and run artifacts are intentionally omitted; use git history or .pan/archive paths for forensic reconstruction.
